roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL APD Motion to Terminate Probation Per 1203.3 PC Due to Death of Defendant

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB:PROB 2 Y:PJ 30 D/CTS:30/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/WS/IND/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/CTORD:GPS MONITORINGIS TERMINATED UPON RETURN OF ALL EQUIPMENT TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REDUCECOUNT ONE, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 25400(A)(2), TO A MIDSDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFTADV NL:001/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO05-29-20/X: BAIL SET AT $40000 /X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO VACATE THE LAST DAY, MATTER IS NOW A LOVE WAIVER/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/CTORD:THAT GOOD CAUSE IS FOUND FOR THE CONTINUANCE PURSUANT TO GC 68115 (COVID-19 PANDEMIC & SF SHELTER-IN-PLACE POLICY)/LD:05-26-20 (60TH)/CONTD:PRELIM HRG ON 05-14-20/DOPC/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/NTW60/LDPX:03-30-20/TE:90 MINUTES/CTORD:HOME DETENTION IS MODIFIED TO INCLUDE AN EXCEPTION ALLOWING DEFENDANT TO MEET WITH COUNSEL/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE'S 1270,2 PC MOTION/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WEAP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 02-10-20 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/PD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X: THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-11-20/987,2/BAIL:500000/TE: 1,5 HRS/CONTD: DEFENSE PC 1270,2 MOTION ON 01-31-20 ANDPRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-10-20, D9/DOP/
/CAL: MOTION TO TERMINATE PROBATION/DEFT DECEASED/NP/CTORD:PROBATION IN #20001313  IS HEREBY TERMINATED/
